address: Flat 2, 63 Albert Road, South Norwood, SE25 4JD
lead_profile_text: Sell-profile lead using STL as a bridge while property is on market awaiting asking price. Already listed on an STR platform but struggling with weekday occupancy — good weekend bookings, cannot fill midweek slots. Wants NHS/contractor-type guests. Plans to handle all furnishing herself so no setup quote needed. SE25 — Selhurst Park (Crystal Palace FC) nearby as demand driver. Competition in SE25 is low. Source: manual meeting summary, no Granola recording.
emotional_profile: Practical and cost-conscious. Motivated by selling — STL is a bridge, not a long-term strategy. Needs confidence in weekday occupancy before fully committing. Looking for clarity on what is truly essential before investing further.
green_light_types: Already operating on STR platform — understands the model
Special offer made (13% + VAT, expires 22 June 2026)
Practical decision-making style — got clear equipment checklist answers
Low competition in SE25 validated her property's position
green_light_trigger_phrases: I'm getting lots of weekend stays but not getting weekday stays
I really want to get more contractors
The competition in the area is quite low
Direct booking potential was fairly high

top_objections.text: Weekday occupancy — not getting enough midweek bookings with current platform
top_objections.zac_response: NHS and healthcare workers from SE25 area are natural weekday guests. Stayful's multi-platform approach and NHS guest framing specifically addresses weekday fill.

top_objections.text: Not confident about achieving asking price on sale in near term — primary motivation for STL bridge
top_objections.zac_response: STL as bridge fully acknowledged — 3-month rolling notice gives full flexibility to exit when buyer is found.

top_objections.text: Wanted clarity on essential vs non-essential equipment before committing further investment
top_objections.zac_response: Full breakdown given: cameras not essential (Airbnb prohibits interior cameras), PIR/motion sensors not essential, fire blankets and smoke detectors essential, smart thermostat essential, key safe essential.

top_objections.text: General uncertainty about whether income projections are achievable given current underperformance
top_objections.zac_response: Low competition in SE25 and high direct booking potential validated her property's market position. Weekday gap attributed to platform limitations, not property quality.

top_questions.text: What equipment is essential vs non-essential for STL?
top_questions.answer: Essential: fire blankets, smoke detectors, smart thermostat, key safe. Not essential: interior cameras (Airbnb prohibits them), PIR/motion sensors.

top_questions.text: How do I get more weekday bookings — specifically contractors and NHS staff?
top_questions.answer: SE25 is well-placed for NHS and healthcare workers — Stayful's multi-platform approach including direct bookings specifically attracts contractor and professional guests. NHS framing in listing description is key.

top_questions.text: What is the management fee and offer?
top_questions.answer: Standard 15% + VAT. Special offer: 13% + VAT if signed by 22 June 2026.

top_questions.text: Can I still sell the property while it's on short-let?
top_questions.answer: Yes — 3-month rolling notice after initial 6-month term. Stayful can work around viewings. Full exit flexibility when buyer is found.

top_questions.text: What is the competitive landscape in SE25?
top_questions.answer: Competition in SE25 is notably low. Direct booking potential is high. Selhurst Park (Crystal Palace FC) is a significant demand driver. Property amenities described as strong relative to local competition.

what_moved_them: Low competition in SE25 well received — less competition for her bookings
High direct booking potential was a positive data point
Property amenities noted as strong vs local competition
Cameras not required — removes a perceived barrier and cost
Smart thermostat framed as essential remote management tool at low cost
what_fell_flat: Income projection confidence not fully established — current underperformance created scepticism
No specific weekday occupancy rate or income figure given for SE25

conversion_gaps.gap: No specific weekday occupancy data or NHS guest booking statistics for SE25
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Follow up with SE25-specific data on NHS and contractor guest rates. Show comparable properties' weekday vs weekend split under Stayful management.

conversion_gaps.gap: Current underperformance on her own listing creating income scepticism
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Share Stayful case study from comparable 1-bed London property — weekday occupancy improvement under professional management.

offer_framing: 13% + VAT (vs standard 15%) — 3 weeks to sign by 22 June 2026. No next meeting agreed.
zac_income_intro: Competition in SE25 is low and direct booking potential is high — your property is well positioned. The weekday gap you're experiencing is a platform issue, not a property issue.
zac_transition_phrases: The Selhurst Park demand driver covers your weekends — the NHS and healthcare angle fills the week
Competition in SE25 is low — you're not fighting for bookings
The cameras question comes up a lot — Airbnb prohibits interior cameras anyway, so you don't need them
zac_reassurance_phrases: The 3-month rolling notice gives you full flexibility — when your buyer comes, you can exit
Fire safety is non-negotiable — everything else on that checklist is optional
Smart thermostat means you never need to be there to manage temperature
